title: AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF HILOÃGOS, PROVINCE OF LEYTE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1581 / 55 OG No. 39, 8225 (September 28, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2552, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF HILOÃGOS, PROVINCE OF LEYTE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The following sitios in the Municipality of Hiloñgos, Province of Leyte, are constituted or converted as barrios of said municipality, to wit:

The sitios of Tagnate, Mahangin, Panas and Hibunlod to be known as the barrio of Tagnate;

The sitios of Agutayan, Lagtangon, Kandasig and Katungawan to be known as the barrio of Agutayan;

The sitios of Campina and Matigbaw to be known as the barrio of Campina; and

The sitio of Magnangoy to be known as the barrio of Magnangoy.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
